notes:
vMLX 1.6.3

Correctness release: concurrent multimodal decode, media streaming, and co-batch determinism.

Highlights:
- Concurrent Gemma-4 corruption fixed: co-batched requests could corrupt one sequence into digit spam or empty streams. Root cause was scalar rope offsets feeding the batched full-attention path; the engine now supplies per-row offset arrays throughout the Gemma-4 attention/rope compatibility layer. This also resolves the long-standing "corrupted batched media prefill" that forced media onto a slow fallback.
- All Gemma-4 media (image, video, audio) now ride the batched scheduler: token-by-token streaming, improved perception accuracy, and generation-config (temperature/top_p/repetition penalty) parity for media turns.
- Gemma-4 E-model audio fixed: audio-tower models (E2B/E4B) previously returned silent empty responses; audio is now routed through the batched processor path with full perception, recall, and tool use after audio turns.
- Co-batch positional skew fixed for non-Qwen multimodal families (e.g. Step-3.7): the batch offset proxy is now gated to the families whose slice ops require it; other families receive true per-row offsets. Verified with a new greedy joined-vs-solo byte-equivalence harness across the family matrix.
- Single-sequence TurboQuant prefix-cache rejection fixed: TQ caches with unset index no longer lose all prefix reuse (MiniMax-M2.7, Qwen3.6, Holo3 now hit the cache in single-stream serving).
- Reasoning-mode streaming: the bounded thinking-off answer pass now streams token-by-token instead of arriving as one buffered delta.
- Tool-call parser hardening: Qwen colon-separator parameter variant, orphan tool-scaffolding strip when structured tool_calls are extracted, and Gemma-4 hallucinated tool-response block removal.
- MiniMax-M3 pinned to its single-batch native scheduler path (prevents engine aborts when launched with higher max-num-seqs).

Verification:
- Full Python suite green with no regressions attributable to this release (A/B verified against the pre-release base); panel suite 2176 passing.
- Live UI validation on Apple Silicon against external-drive JANG/JANGTQ/MXFP4 bundles: session-managed model loading with per-family autodetection (parsers, cache policy, TQ-KV, VLM routing), streaming typewriter render, VL image turns, built-in coding tools loop, stop button, generation-config controls, reasoning block render with multiturn recall and growing TurboQuant prefix-cache hits.
- Both DMGs are Developer ID signed (team 55KGF2S5AY), Apple notarized, stapled, and Gatekeeper accepted.

DMG SHA256:
- vMLX-1.6.3-sequoia-arm64.dmg: eda146140d76e6d19fd98b1d7143c34678ee0a3c4aefdbd97b615420436efeca
- vMLX-1.6.3-tahoe-arm64.dmg: 82d553e4cea9a8f3e9b123f98b4cae9e021c0d9200f597c4b0de9562d933b96e

Flavors: sequoia (macosx_14 wheels; Sonoma 14.5+, Sequoia 15, Tahoe) and tahoe (native macosx_26 wheels; Tahoe only).
